questions.question: Consider a dataset with two features, X1 and X2, and a continuous target variable Y. Implement a Locally Weighted Regression (LWR) model to predict Y for a new data point. What is the primary goal of LWR in this context?
What is the key difference between Locally Weighted Regression (LWR) and the traditional weighted k-NN algorithm?
Suppose you are building an LWR model to predict house prices based on features such as number of bedrooms and square footage. How would you select the neighborhood size (or radius) for the model?
